c74object.name: max.riddim.get
c74object.digest: Get djay Pro values from max.riddim.brain
c74object.description:
Retrieves specific values from the stored OSC data inside max.riddim.brain.
Needs a valid path like "djay/turntable1/playback/time".
Output value/type depends on the maxriddim dictionary structure.
djay/turntable1/playback/time returns a float.
djay/turntable1 returns a dictionary.

inlet.digest: Toggle constant or trigger single get.
inlet.description: '1/0' to toggle constant retrieval on/off, 'bang' to trigger a single retrieval.

outlet.digest: Value associated to given key path.
outlet.description: Return any value associated to given key path if it exists inside the maxriddim dictionary.

objarg.name: address
objarg.digest: Key path to the desired value/s
objarg.description:
This path will be used to search inside maxriddim.
Syntax: djay/.../... or max/.../...
(note that the first level doesnt start with a '/').

method.name: int
method.description:
Toggle constant retrieval.
1 to toggle reteival On.
0 to toggle retrieval Off.
